differential_diagnoses: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with lupus nephritis and secondary hypercoagulability
Membranous nephropathy complicated by renal vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism
Infective endocarditis with septic pulmonary emboli and immune-complex glomerulonephritis
next_steps: Initiate therapeutic systemic anticoagulation with heparin
Order comprehensive autoimmune serology: ANA, dsDNA, complement levels (C3, C4), ANCA, anti-GBM, and antiphospholipid panel
Perform transthoracic/transesophageal echocardiogram to rule out vegetation or intracardiac thrombus
Obtain renal biopsy once the patient is hemodynamically stable and anticoagulated
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics pending blood/sputum culture results
Close monitoring of renal function and urine output
